chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D- 241 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA 7237/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 3. For orders on CMA No.1027/2024 (Ex.A) 4. For hearing of main case 29-10-2025 Matter is already fixed by the office on 22-01-2026. None present for the Petitioner nor any intimation received. Record reflects that on 15-10-2025 application for urgent was moved by Counsel for the Petitioner; same was dismissed due to non-appearance of the Counsel. This is second application for urgent hearing; again nobody is present to pursue it. Accordingly, the application for urgent hearing is dismissed with cost of Rs.500/-. Let the matter come up on the date already fixed by the office. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
